title: STORYHIVE On Location: Victoria Kris Krug-LS
description: Twenty-five years ago he was one of the first people in Vancouver to understand what the internet was going to do to photography. Ten years ago he was one of the first photographers to understand what AI was going to do to creativity. Today he is building what he calls a mycelial network of innovation through BC's creative underground. In this episode of Telus Storyhive On-Location Victoria, we sit down with Kris Krüg - renowned photographer, AI community architect, founder of Future Proof Creatives, creator of the Vancouver AI Community Meetups, and one of the most provocative and community-rooted voices in BC's AI conversation. This is a conversation about survival, identity, and the future of BC's creative soul in an age where AI could either erase or enhance it - and about why the path we choose right now shapes what it means to be human in an AI world. Produced by Haus of Owl in partnership with TELUS STORYHIVE On Location.
